# News Digest — full overview

> A daily, AI-curated news digest running on Cloudflare Workers. Users authenticate with GitHub, pick tags from a curated 20-tag allowlist, and see a personalised feed sourced from ~50 hourly-scraped RSS/Atom/JSON feeds. Summaries are LLM-generated (NYT-style titles, 1–3 paragraph bodies, deduped across sources). Single-operator, pre-launch.

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌──────────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────────┐
│ Cron hourly ├───▶│ SCRAPE_COORDINATOR   ├───▶│ SCRAPE_CHUNKS (queue)│
│ 0 * * * *   │    │ (fetch + canonical-  │    │  → LLM → persist to  │
│ worker.ts   │    │  dedupe + chunk)     │    │  global article pool │
└─────────────┘    └──────────────────────┘    └──────────────────────┘

┌─────────────┐    ┌──────────────────────┐
│ Cron daily  ├───▶│ starred-exempt 7-day │
│ 0 3 * * *   │    │ retention cleanup    │
└─────────────┘    └──────────────────────┘

┌─────────────┐    ┌──────────────────────┐
│ Cron 5-min  ├───▶│ once-per-day email   │
│ */5 * * * * │    │ dispatcher + tag     │
│             │    │ discovery drain      │
└─────────────┘    └──────────────────────┘
```

## Data model

```sql
articles(id, canonical_url UNIQUE, primary_source_name, primary_source_url,
         title, details_json, tags_json, published_at, ingested_at,
         scrape_run_id)
article_sources(article_id → articles.id, source_name, source_url, published_at)
article_tags(article_id → articles.id, tag)
article_stars(user_id → users.id, article_id → articles.id, starred_at)
article_reads(user_id, article_id, read_at)
scrape_runs(id, started_at, finished_at, articles_ingested,
            articles_deduped, tokens_in, tokens_out,
            estimated_cost_usd, model_id, chunk_count, status)
users(... hashtags_json, digest_hour, digest_minute, tz,
      email_enabled, last_emailed_local_date, ...)
```

## Pipeline cost

- ~500 candidates per tick × ~100 per chunk = ~5 chunks/hour
- @cf/openai/gpt-oss-120b at ~$0.35/M tokens
- **~$4.60/day = ~$140/month** independent of user count
- Browser-rendering fallback considered but not enabled (RSS body snippets + LLM synthesis cover ~80% of feeds acceptably)

## Sources per tag

Every default tag has ≥1 curated source. Tag list:
cloudflare, ai, mcp, agenticai, genai, aws, cloud, serverless, workers,
azure, zero-trust, microsegmentation, kubernetes, terraform, devsecops,
observability, rust, python, postgres, threat-intel.

50-source composition: 8 cloud vendors, 8 AI labs, 4 MCP/agentic, 8 security, 6 DevOps/platforms, 4 languages, 6 community aggregators, 4 databases, 2 observability.

## User flow

1. GitHub OAuth → new account seeded with 20 default tags
2. Settings: pick local digest-ready time, toggle email, restore-defaults button
3. Dashboard `/digest`: 30 newest articles matching user's tags, "Last updated at HH:MM · Next update in Xm Ys" countdown
4. Per-card: source badge, star button, tag-disclosure
5. Article detail: title, small-caps metadata, drop-cap body, "Read at source" (single-source direct link; multi-source modal)
6. `/starred`: user's starred articles (survive the 7-day retention cutoff)
7. `/history`: day-grouped past articles + per-day token/cost aggregates from scrape_runs

## Retention

- Articles older than 7 days are deleted nightly (03:00 UTC) **unless** at least one user has starred them.
- Stars are idempotent via `INSERT OR IGNORE` on the `(user_id, article_id)` primary key.
- FK ON DELETE CASCADE removes article_sources, article_tags, article_reads when a parent article goes.

## Key engineering decisions

- **Global pool, not per-user runs**: LLM cost is O(1) in users, so adding users has zero marginal cost. Legacy per-user pipeline (REQ-GEN-*) retired.
- **Canonical URL dedupe**: utm_* / fbclid / trailing slash / scheme stripping at write time, followed by an in-chunk LLM `dedup_groups` merge pass for semantic collisions ("same story, different outlets").
- **First-source-wins**: earliest `published_at` in a cluster becomes the card's primary; all other sources land in `article_sources` and surface as an alt-source modal.
- **Retry → mark-failed**: coordinator + chunk consumer both stamp `scrape_runs.status='failed'` on the third retry attempt, so orphans never stay 'running' forever.
- **Write-time URL scheme gate**: `javascript:` / `data:` / `file:` URLs are dropped at the coordinator before they reach article_sources, never rendered as `href`.

## Crawling policy

Public crawlers: landing page + static assets (favicon, manifest, OG image, sponsor SVG). Everything else 303-redirects to login.

AI training crawlers blocked in robots.txt — summaries are transformed third-party work and the product isn't in a position to license that re-use.

## Contact

Operator: Nikola Novoselec. Publisher: Gray Matter GmbH (https://graymatter.ch). Built with Codeflare (https://codeflare.ch).
